techniques.name: PPGPass Wearable Authentication
techniques.description: Wearable-based authentication technique using photoplethysmogram (PPG) signals. The technique makes Irrevocable PPG signals revocable through non-invertible transformation.
sources: @inproceedings{caoPPGPassNonintrusiveSecure2020,  title = {{{PPGPass}}: {{Nonintrusive}} and {{Secure Mobile Two-Factor Authentication}} via {{Wearables}}},  booktitle = {{{IEEE INFOCOM}} 2020 - {{IEEE Conference}} on {{Computer Communications}}},  author = {Cao, Yetong and Zhang, Qian and Li, Fan and Yang, Song and Wang, Yu},  year = {2020},  month = jul,  pages = {1917--1926},  issn = {2641-9874},  doi = {10.1109/INFOCOM41043.2020.9155380}}
